43-apps.stdout:
Apps import the engine — the engine never imports apps.

  cd apps/flux2 && go run .
  cd apps/mosstts && go run .

61-w2a.stdout:
w2a is a separate module — engine packages never contain tests.

  cd w2a
  go run .                    # interactive menu
  go test ./tests/dense -v    # timed FormatNone matrix
  go test ./tests/mha -v      # MHA coverage
